message:
feat(infra): TestContext struct, fixture robustness, misc hardening

Test logging (test_logging.rs):
- Add TestContext struct for standardized structured test metadata:
  test_id, seed, subsystem, invariant fields with log_start/log_end
  methods that emit tracing::info events with consistent field names
- Enables machine-parseable test logs for coverage auditing

Test utils (test_utils.rs):
- Additional helper functions (19 lines)

Record/task:
- TaskPhaseCell::load() catch-all arm now emits debug_assert on invalid
  phase values instead of silently mapping to Completed. Release builds
  still fall back to Completed for forward compatibility.

Combinator/join:
- Add debug_assert verifying successes vector is sorted by index before
  gap detection in join_all_to_result. Catches corruption early.

Sync/semaphore:
- Updates to OwnedAcquireFuture poll (27 line change)

Distributed/recovery:
- Additional recovery path handling (4 lines)

Lab/network config:
- Clarify bandwidth field documentation: None uses default_bandwidth,
  Some(0) disables bandwidth limiting for specific links

Plan/fixtures:
- Add cx.checkpoint() cancellation check in SharedLabHandle poll loop
- Fix dynamic label/trace assertions: use OR instead of AND for skip
  condition (fan-in fixtures may skip one side but not both)
- Fix cost_delta assertion: allow delta >= 0 (rewrites must not increase
  cost, but zero delta is acceptable)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -18,7 +18,8 @@ pub struct NetworkConfig {
     pub tick_resolution: Duration,
     /// Enable bandwidth simulation.
     pub enable_bandwidth: bool,
-    /// Default bandwidth per link (bytes/second).
+    /// Default bandwidth per link (bytes/second) when bandwidth simulation is enabled
+    /// and a link does not provide an explicit bandwidth.
     pub default_bandwidth: u64,
 }
 
@@ -49,7 +50,11 @@ pub struct NetworkConditions {
     pub packet_reorder: f64,
     /// Maximum packets in flight.
     pub max_in_flight: usize,
-    /// Bandwidth limit (bytes/second), None = unlimited.
+    /// Bandwidth limit (bytes/second).
+    ///
+    /// When bandwidth simulation is enabled:
+    /// - `None` uses `NetworkConfig::default_bandwidth`
+    /// - `Some(0)` disables bandwidth limiting for this link
     pub bandwidth: Option<u64>,
     /// Jitter model for variable latency.
     pub jitter: Option<JitterModel>,
